security_trigger_reason: implementation touches support RBAC, evidence trust boundary, owner-routed actions, replay/idempotency, and canonical auth/release evidence validation

evidence: apps/core/src/platform/operator-api.ts:679 and :702-815 require F-0024 operator admission on support routes; POST/PATCH bodies are capped by readBoundedJson before admission and writes require SUPPORT_OPERATION RBAC.

apps/core/src/support/support-evidence.ts:199-230 and :361-543 redact support refs/actions/notes/residual-risk before normalized request hash and persistence, append server-side admission evidence, and validate canonical refs before store update.

packages/db/src/support.ts:261-270, :414-464, :735-768, and :770-943 constrain writes to support-owned surfaces, preserve idempotent replay, and turn post-claim failures into rejected request_failed replays rather than permanent request_in_progress.

apps/core/src/support/support-actions.ts:37-85 routes owner_routed actions only through owner seams and records human_only actions as documented; apps/core/src/support/support-canonical-refs.ts:192-279 validates report/release/auth evidence through bounded readers, with runtime wiring through createOperatorAuthStore.hasAllowedAuthEvidence at apps/core/src/runtime/runtime-lifecycle.ts:1894-1901.

notes: PASS: security audit of e8c7c2d90755 found no high-confidence exploitable issue in support route RBAC/admission, client-supplied evidence validation, owner action routing, idempotent replay, post-claim failure rejection, redaction before persistence/hash for support evidence fields, incident listing admission, or bounded F-0024/F-0026 validation.
